# Ottr Plumr — Niagara Region Plumbing & Heating

> Licensed plumbers and HVAC technicians serving the Niagara Region, Ontario. 24/7 emergency service across St. Catharines, Niagara Falls, Welland, and surrounding areas.

## Business
- Company: Ottr Plumr Plumbing & Heating
- Phone: 289-488-1007
- Email: info@plumr.ca
- Address: 187 King St, Welland, ON L3B 3J4
- Website: https://www.plumr.ca

## Services
- Residential & Commercial Plumbing
- Emergency Plumbing (24/7)
- Drain Cleaning
- Water Heater Installation & Repair
- Sump Pumps
- Heating Systems (Furnaces & Boilers)
- Repairs & Diagnostics

## Service Areas
Welland, St. Catharines, Niagara Falls, Thorold, Lincoln, Grimsby, Pelham, Fort Erie, Port Colborne, Niagara-on-the-Lake, West Lincoln, Wainfleet
